name: Baked or Grilled Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Halve the onions and arrange them in a greased baking dish or on a greased grill rack.
3. Dot each onion half with butter or oil.
4. Cook until browned and slightly charred, about 45 minutes to 1 hour and 15 minutes, brushing with more butter or oil as needed to keep moist.
5. Season the onions with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
6. Serve hot or chilled.
Yield: Serves 6
